items.title: Bellerín stuns Madrid to put Barça closer to title
items.summary: Héctor Bellerín scored an equaliser in the fourth minute of stoppage time as Real Madrid's title hopes suffered a further setback with a 1-1 draw at Real Betis.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Alcaraz (wrist) won't defend French Open title
items.summary: Two-time defending French Open champion Carlos Alcaraz won't attempt to defend his title due to a wrist injury.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Tracking 2026 NBA Draft decisions: Cameron Boozer, Brayden Burries and other top prospects yet to declare
items.summary: The 2026 NBA Draft will take place June 23-24 in Brooklyn
